sourceAmbiguity: Browser automation can make provider-console changes quickly, including billable or hard-to-revert actions.
decisionTaken: Live mutation requires ALLOW_SIGNAL_PROVIDER_MUTATION plus target environment, provider family, credentials, approver, signature/replay preflight, rollback snapshot, and redaction.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared operating contract allows real-console work only under explicit gates and evidence discipline.
operationalRisk: Ungated mutation can point callbacks at wrong environments, enable spending, or leave providers in a partially configured state.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Promote candidate selectors only after a provider-specific rollback drill passes with redacted evidence.
